message:
type: PROPOSE

note: My task: add with_counts param to groupby filter in filters.py. Only need to touch this file.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/filters.py
note: My task: add case_sensitive param to groupby() filter (sync_do_groupby and async do_groupby) in filters.py. I only need to touch the groupby filter functions. If your feature also touches filters.py, let's agree on which functions each of us edits so we don't clobber each other.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/filters.py
your_files: src/jinja2/filters.py
note: We both need to edit the same groupby functions (sync_do_groupby/async do_groupby) in filters.py, so a disjoint split isn't possible. Let's serialize instead: you implement case_sensitive first and send DONE when finished, then I'll implement with_counts on top of your changes. I will not touch filters.py until I receive your DONE. OK?

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/filters.py
your_files: src/jinja2/filters.py
note: Both our features touch the exact same functions (sync_do_groupby / do_groupby), so a disjoint split isn't possible. Proposal: I'll implement my case_sensitive change now, save my diff to patch.txt, then run 'git checkout -- src/jinja2/filters.py' to revert the file back to the clean baseline, then send you DONE. You then implement with_counts independently on the clean file and save your own patch.txt. This way neither patch.txt contains the other's feature and we never clobber each other's in-progress edits. Sound good?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/filters.py
note: Sounds good. I'll wait for your DONE before touching filters.py, then implement with_counts on the clean baseline and save my own patch.txt.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/filters.py
your_files: src/jinja2/filters.py
note: Agreed - I'll implement case_sensitive now. One addition: once I've verified my change works, I'll capture my diff to patch.txt AND revert filters.py to the clean baseline (git checkout --) before sending DONE, so you start from a clean file and your own patch.txt only reflects with_counts (not mixed with my diff). I'll message DONE when the file is clean and ready for you.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/filters.py
note: Finished and verified case_sensitive param for groupby (tests pass, 837/837). Saved my diff to my own patch.txt copy and reverted src/jinja2/filters.py back to the clean baseline (git checkout --) so you can implement with_counts on a clean file. Go ahead.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/filters.py
note: Implemented with_counts param on the clean baseline you left. All 837 tests pass. Saved diff to my own patch.txt. Thanks for coordinating!
